Functions and definitions for BLE Device Information Service (DIS) in kernel_le_client.


## Files
- **[dis.c](dis.c.md)**: Functions for handling BLE service discovery and removal events in the kernel_le_client component.
- **[dis.h](dis.h.md)**: Implements a Device Information Service (DIS) client for handling BLE characteristics.
- **[dis_definition.h](dis_definition.h.md)**: Defines UUIDs for the Device Information Service (DIS) and its characteristics in a BLE context.
